creator: sakai@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
mknetid(8) manpage says (in OPTIONS section):

	| -h group-file
	|  The -h flag can be used to specify the location of the hosts
	|  database file. The compiled-in default is /etc/hosts.

Fix: 

I think the first line quoted above should be
	"-h hosts-file", not "-h group-file".
How-To-Repeat: 
	$ man 8 mknetid
